name: Emulsion Polymerization
description: Emulsion polymerization builds polymer inside surfactant micelles dispersed in water: above the critical micelle concentration a water-soluble initiator generates radicals that enter micelles to nucleate particles, monomer diffuses from droplets to feed propagation, and growth continues until droplets are exhausted, yielding a polymer latex.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Monomer + water + surfactant"]
    N2["Above CMC: micelles form"]
    N3["Monomer droplets reservoir"]
    N4["Add aqueous initiator"]
    N5["Radical enters micelle"]
    N6["Particle nucleation"]
    N7["Monomer diffuses from droplets"]
    N8["Propagate in particles"]
    N9{"Droplets depleted?"}
    N10["Continue from particle pool"]
    N11["Polymer latex"]
